violations.text: The cutting boards in the back storage and the cutting block above the lowboy prep unit on the line are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Cutting boards were voluntarily disposed of by person in charge at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
The robo-coop slicer attachment was observed to be chipped. PIC removed equipment from storage area to be serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Chicken was observed held at 122 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated food to 165 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023

The front service refrigeration cold drawer/cold rail unit was observed maintaining an ambient temperature of 54 degrees Fahrenheit. The unit was taken out of service and repairs were being made at the time of visit. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023
